name: codex-nexus
description: Thin Codex plugin wrapper that packages nexus-core skills, agent specs, and MCP tooling.

interface.longDescription: Install the Codex-facing outputs from nexus-core as a thin plugin wrapper: generated skills, generated agent specs, and MCP wiring for Nexus planning and task tools.
defaultPrompt: Use [plan] to structure an implementation decision before coding
Set up Nexus task orchestration for this repository
